scripts.build: tsc && vite build && mkdir -p dist/blog && cp blog/blog.html dist/blog/blog.html && cp -R blog/images dist/blog/images && cp style.css dist/style.css && cp script.js dist/script.js && cp favicon.svg dist/favicon.svg && cp favicon.ico dist/favicon.ico && cp logo.svg dist/logo.svg && cp robots.txt dist/robots.txt && cp sitemap.xml dist/sitemap.xml && cp CV_Warre_Snaet.pdf dist/CV_Warre_Snaet.pdf
